description: Address 4 issues from the semantic review: dead hover rule, missing focus-within, dismiss opacity conflict, and tabs padding-bottom.
steps: Fix dead hover rule on .topbar-search by changing background to var(--bg-hover)
Add .topbar-search:focus-within rule with border-color: var(--accent) and box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent-dim)
Add opacity: 1 to .attention-card-action.dismiss:hover to override parent hover opacity
acceptance_criteria: topbar-search hover provides a visible change from the default state
topbar-search focus-within shows a blue ring for keyboard accessibility
dismiss hover displays at full opacity
tabs-underline has padding-bottom: 2px for breathing room
findings: All 4 review issues fixed in globals.css. Typecheck and build both pass cleanly.
